name: Operation Shadow's Sleep
desc: The Stryll Order seek to eliminate difficult 'targets' currently occupying various political posts, and would like to take advantage of our influential trust to gain unfettered access to these individuals.

dialogue.speaker: Stryll Representative
dialogue.character: We've come to call in a favor. One you greatly owe.
Your influence has allowed you great privilege in accessing areas that even for us are... difficult.
dialogue.player: Where exactly are you needing help reaching?

dialogue.character: A number of highly secure targets. Ones within powerful leadership roles. We are being paid quite generously to... eliminate some of these figures.
dialogue.player: Even with our clout, such areas will be heavily monitored.

dialogue.character: I'm sure you are talented enough to create a sufficient distraction... with enough time to reach the targets.
dialogue.player: How large of a distraction will this entail?

dialogue.character: Of course... your team will need to carry out the kills themselves. Can't have this tracing back to our clients.
dialogue.player: We'll also expect to be paid... generously.

tasks.name: Shadow's Diversion
tasks.desc: Using our influential access, create convincing distractions that will allow the 'Sleeper' team to reach their targets undetected
tasks.requires: Requires: Disable any Rare (or rarer) enemy.

tasks.name: Eliminate Targets
tasks.desc: Once diversions are prepared, this 'Sleeper' team will move stealthily to the targets and assassinate them.
tasks.requires: Requires: Use an Assassination Contract on an Enemy Player
